info.name: EPiC_API
info.description: Postman collection for EPiC_API endpoints with payloads

request.description: Get detailed performance report for a specific caseworker. Replace '1' with the caseworker ID. Optional query parameters: startDate, endDate
Generate and download PDF performance report for a specific caseworker. Replace '1' with the caseworker ID

Filter caseworkers by department, SLA level, and search query. Query parameters: search (optional), department (optional: 'all', 'immigration', 'compliance'), sla_level (optional: 'all', 'high', 'medium', 'low')

Export a combined PDF report with all system reports (Case, Workload, Financial, Performance) for a given date range. Query parameters: startDate (required, format: YYYY-MM-DD), endDate (required, format: YYYY-MM-DD)

body.raw:
{
  "candidate": "John Doe",
  "candidateId": "CAND-001",

  "priority": "high",

  "totalAmount": 5000.00,
  "paidAmount": 2000.00,
  "notes": "Urgent processing required"
}

  "severity": "Critical",

}

formdata.description: Optional - only if document is case-related
Select one or more files to upload

item.name: Documents - Get User Documents by Category
Documents - Get User Documents by Category

request.description: Export team workload report as CSV file. Contains caseworker names, email, job title, department, region, active cases, overdue cases, pending tasks, average completion time, workload percentage, and health status.
Export pending tasks report as CSV file. Contains task ID, title, case code, assigned to, assigned email, due date, days remaining, risk status, priority, task status, and created date.
Export deadline monitoring report as CSV file. Contains case ID, case code, candidate name, caseworker IDs, deadline, days remaining, risk status, case status, priority, nationality, and job title.

item.name: Export Combined Report (CSV) - All Reports in One File

request.description: Export all three reports (Team Workload, Pending Tasks, Deadline Monitor) combined into a single CSV file with section headers. Each section contains relevant data for that report type.

query.description: Filter by action: ALL, LOGIN, LOGOUT, CASE_CREATED, CASE_UPDATED, PAYMENT_PROCESSED, USER_CREATED, USER_UPDATED, USER_MANAGEMENT
Filter by user ID or ALL
Filter by status: ALL, SUCCESS, FAILED, PENDING

request.description: Get audit logs with optional filters and pagination
Get all user management activities (USER_CREATED + USER_UPDATED)

item.name: Get Audit Logs - By Specific User

request.description: Get audit logs for a specific user
Get audit log statistics (cards data: total, successful, failed, pending, today count)

query.description: Filter by action: ALL, LOGIN, LOGOUT, CASE_CREATED, CASE_UPDATED, PAYMENT_PROCESSED, USER_CREATED, USER_UPDATED, USER_MANAGEMENT
Filter by user ID or ALL
Filter by status: ALL, SUCCESS, FAILED, PENDING

request.description: Export filtered audit logs as CSV file

item.name: Export Audit Logs CSV - Last 30 Days Failed

request.description: Export failed activities from last 30 days as CSV

item.name: Export Audit Logs CSV - Case Operations

request.description: Export case creation activities from last 3 months as CSV
